---
title: "Cicely Gertrude Papillon"
---

## Cicely Gertrude Papillon

**Dates:** (after 1870-after 1952)

### Description

presumably the C. G. Papillon who contributed to <i>MP</i> (1895)

### Biography

Daughter of Emily Caroline (Garnier) Papillon.

---

[← Back to all letters](../letters.html)
